channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Pakistan Facilitates Diplomatic Dialogue Amid Middle East Tensions
item.description: According to the Foreign Office (FO) spokesperson Tahir Andrabi, Pakistan is actively acting as a ‘bridge builder’ amid the ongoing US-Israeli military actions against Iran. The conflict escalated aft...

item.title: Extreme Heat Wave Shatters March Temperature Records in Western Cape and Namakwa District
item.description: The South African Weather Service (SAWS) has confirmed that a persistent high-pressure system has caused extreme heat conditions across the Namakwa District and parts of the Western Cape. Several weat...

item.title: Gains from Women's Contributions: Women's History Month Reflection
item.description: As we mark Women’s History Month here in Kenya and worldwide, it’s good to reflect on the strides women have made and the gains we continue to achieve. The article dives into how women’s roles have ev...

item.title: Early Detection of Melanoma: Personal Experience and Prevention Tips
item.description: Skin cancer is the most frequently diagnosed form of cancer, with millions of cases expected globally each year. Julia Musto shares her personal experience of discovering a mole on her face that promp...

item.title: Government relaxes fuel standards to boost supply amid petrol concerns
item.description: The Federal Government has temporarily relaxed fuel quality standards to increase petrol availability by around 100 million litres per month, particularly in regional areas. Energy Minister Chris Bowe...

item.title: Montreal Grapples with Hazardous Roads and Power Outages Following Winter Storm
item.description: Montreal and surrounding areas are experiencing challenging conditions following a recent winter storm. Icy roads have created hazardous driving conditions, prompting delays in public transit and scho...

item.title: Prince William and Princess Catherine Visit Bermondsey Beer Mile and Borough Market to Support Local Businesses
item.description: Prince William and Princess Catherine embarked on a day of unannounced visits across London, beginning at Borough Market and continuing to the Bermondsey Beer Mile. At Borough Market, the couple engag...

item.title: Kenya Meteorological Department Issues Heavy Rain Advisory for Nairobi and Surrounding Counties
item.description: The Kenya Meteorological Department (KMD) has issued a warning for Nairobi and neighbouring counties to prepare for moderate to heavy rainfall within the next 24 hours. The advisory, valid from 9pm on...

item.title: Vandalur Zoo's Lion and Deer Safari Closed for Ten Days for Urgent Repairs
item.description: The Arignar Anna Zoological Park (AAZP) in Vandalur, Chennai, has announced that its lion and deer safari will remain closed to visitors for a period of ten days, from March 18 to March 28, 2026. Acco...

item.title: Tanzania expands Rafiki Briquette project to promote clean energy nationwide
item.description: The Tanzanian government, through STAMICO, is pushing hard to expand clean cooking energy use across the country via the Rafiki Briquette project. Deputy Minister for Minerals, Dr Steven Kiruswa, repo...

item.title: Nehal Hashmi Appointed as Sindh Governor Following PM’s Recommendation
item.description: On Thursday, President Asif Ali Zardari officially approved the appointment of Nehal Hashmi from PML-N as the new governor of Sindh, following the recommendation from Prime Minister Shehbaz Sharif. Ha...

item.title: Australia grants asylum to Iranian footballers amid safety concerns
item.description: Several members of the Iranian women's football team have sought asylum in Australia following fears for their safety back home. This week, seven women connected to the team were granted humanitarian ...

item.title: Batang Quiapo Episode 798: Tanggol and Miguelito Face Their Final Confrontation
item.description: In Episode 798 of the popular ABS-CBN series 'Batang Quiapo,' the long-standing conflict between Tanggol Montenegro and Miguelito Guerrero reaches a dramatic climax. Fans have been following the inten...

item.title: Tanzania Traders Present Key Operational Challenges at Dar es Salaam Port to Parliament
item.description: Traders in Tanzania, through the Tanzania Customs Agents Association (Tacas), have brought forward 10 key grievances to the Parliamentary Standing Committee on Infrastructure regarding the ongoing cha...

item.title: Government decides to control further fuel price hikes amid global oil surge
item.description: ISLAMABAD: The federal government has imposed a ban on the export of all petroleum products and is contemplating not increasing domestic fuel prices further despite a steady rise in global oil rates. ...

item.title: The Importance of Emotional Equality in Healthy Relationships
item.description: This article talk about how emotional equality dey very important for any good relationship. E no be about who give more love or do big big things, but about both partners dey give fully and equally. ...

item.title: Government Officials Responsible for Majority of Social Grant Fraud, Warns IEJ
item.description: A recent analysis by the Institute for Economic Justice (IEJ) reveals that between 2014 and 2025, roughly 75% of social grant fraud cases in South Africa involved government employees, contractors or ...

item.title: Iran’s Leader Highlights Strategic Importance of Strait of Hormuz Amid Rising Tensions
item.description: Iran’s Supreme Leader has publicly stated that the Strait of Hormuz, a vital global shipping route for oil, should be leveraged amid ongoing regional tensions. This marks his first official statement ...

item.title: Farooq Abdullah Survives Attempt on Life, Demands Comprehensive Investigation
item.description: On March 11, 2026, former Jammu and Kashmir Chief Minister and National Conference president Farooq Abdullah, aged 88, narrowly escaped an assassination attempt during a wedding function in Jammu. A l...

item.title: Werder Bremen Defender Felix Agu Returns to Full Team Training After Adductor Injury
item.description: Werder Bremen don receive better news as dem Nigerian defender, Felix Agu, don resume full team training on Thursday ahead of dia Bundesliga match against FSV Mainz on Sunday. The 26-year-old player b...
